injuries_home: Ismael Kone out with a leg fracture and will miss the remainder of the World Cup; Alphonso Davies is returning from a hamstring injury and Jesse Marsch said Canada were deciding whether to use him from the start or off the bench.
injuries_away: Chadi Riad doubtful/fitness concern with a knock but reportedly returned to full training and was expected to be available barring a late setback; Nayef Aguerd and Abde Ezzalzouli were ruled out of Morocco's World Cup squad before the tournament because of injuries.
expected_lineup_home: Sports Mole predicted Canada XI: Crepeau; Johnston, Bombito, Cornelius, Laryea; Buchanan, Saliba, Eustaquio, Shaffelburg; David, Oluwaseyi.
expected_lineup_away: Sports Mole predicted Morocco XI: Bono; Hakimi, Diop, Riad, Mazraoui; El Aynaoui, Bouaddi; Diaz, Ounahi, El Khannouss; Saibari.
coach_comments_home: Jesse Marsch said Canada would consider using Alphonso Davies either from the start or off the bench, said Canada would not change its identity but would use tactical nuances, and described preparing for Morocco as a difficult task because they are very strong.
coach_comments_away: Mohamed Ouahbi said Brahim Diaz is important defensively and offensively, that Morocco try to create organised chaos through mobility, and told his players Canada would be Morocco's most challenging World Cup match so far.
